<cmd>cat > /tmp/ssh_test.py << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko
import sys
paramiko.util.log_to_file('/tmp/paramiko.log')
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
try:
    ssh.connect("bandit.labs.overthewire.org", port=2220, username="bandit7", password="morbNTDkSW6jIlUc0ymOdMaLnOlFVAaj", timeout=10)
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command("cat data.txt | uniq", timeout=10)
    result = stdout.read().decode()
    print(result)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
finally:
    ssh.close()
PYEOF</cmd>
